heading: Edit a MongoDB Search Index
body:
To update a search index for a cluster using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas clusters search indexes update <indexId> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas clusters search indexes update](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-clusters-search-indexes-update).

> **Note:** While your updated index is building, different nodes might update at
> varying speeds. During this period, you might experience mixed query
> results, reflecting both the new index definition and the previous
> index definition.
